Ami Paris Heart Embroidered Striped Long-Sleeve Shirt, made from harp-patterned combed Oxford fabric. Tight yet smooth, comfortable and skin-friendly. A striking contrast of black and white, using stripes as brushstrokes to measure elegance and edge. Black thread features the signature heart embroidery. Custom hardware, ribbing, and accessories. Pattern matched. Unisex.

Sizes (cm):
39 - Chest 121, Shoulder 47.5, Back length 74.5  
40 - Chest 125, Shoulder 49.5, Back length 76  
41 - Chest 129, Shoulder 51.5, Back length 77.5  
42 - Chest 133, Shoulder 53.5, Back length 79

Ami Paris Heart Jacquard Cardigan Knit Sweater, crafted from luxurious Merino wool. Soft, delicate, and comfortable against the skin, featuring a gentle off-white base with a vivid cinnabar red heart on the chest, radiating a unique charm and serving as a visual soul anchor with strong brand recognition. The cardigan’s distinctive silhouette and exquisite button design embody French elegance and casual style. A minimalist color palette expressing passion and dedication to life. Made with German-imported jacquard machinery, precisely controlling yarn arrangement for a vivid, three-dimensional Ami heart jacquard pattern. Garment undergoes softening and deodorizing wash treatment for enhanced feel and appearance. Straight, fine stitching; soft, comfortable fabric; consistent color without variation. Easily styled for various occasions, with custom accessories and complete labeling. Unisex, sizes S-XL.

Ami Paris Heart-Padded Embroidered Down Jacket features 100% polyester taffeta fabric woven in a tight plain weave, creating a smooth, structured surface with a subtle crispness. The fabric produces a distinctive crisp rustling sound when moving. It has a fine texture and a soft, elegant silk-like sheen—understated and refined, unlike shiny satin. The lining is made of 100% nylon with a high-density weave to prevent down leakage, offering a smooth feel, excellent durability, and tear resistance without adding weight. 

The embroidery is crafted by tightly securing the fabric and padding in an embroidery frame. Sparse stitching outlines the heart pattern on the padding layer, followed by dense stitching covering the foam padding, creating a soft, raised heart embroidery that is subtle yet distinctive. Filled with 160g of 90% white duck down, carefully selected and treated to prevent down leakage, ensuring superior warmth and durability. 

The jacket features precise, neat stitching, consistent color without variation, and a comfortable, soft fabric. It pairs well with matching items for a stylish look suitable for various occasions. Custom hardware included, complete with three official labels. Unisex design available in sizes S, M, and L.

Ami Paris Heart Embroidered Zip-up Hoodie  
Made from custom mercerized soft cotton with a delicate, comfortable feel against the skin.  
Features a unique misty sea blue shade, a diluted deep-sea spectrum.  
Black silk thread heart embroidery dances gracefully on the chest, engraving French romantic codes.  
An ultimate simplification of color, expressing passion and dedication to life.  
Minimalist design with free-flowing lines, offering unrestricted comfort and shape.  
Crafted using imported machine embroidery technology with advanced computer control and precision machinery for high accuracy and smooth, delicate lines.  
Fabric is washed for enhanced texture, resistant to deformation, shrinkage, and fading, ensuring lasting beauty.  
Available in sizes S-XL.
